languages.text: "Плевать мне на его приказы. Теперь их отдаю я!"
"His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"
languages.original_text: "Плевать мне на его приказы. Теперь их отдаю я!"

traits.locale_text: "His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"
"His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"
"His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"
"His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"
"His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"

languages.text: “他的命令对我来说毫无意义。从此刻起，该由我来发号施令！”
languages.original_text: "His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"

traits.locale_text: “他的命令对我来说毫无意义。从此刻起，该由我来发号施令！”

languages.text: "Onun emirleri bir şey ifade etmiyor. Şu andan itibaren emirleri veren ben olacağım!"
languages.original_text: "His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"

traits.locale_text: "Onun emirleri bir şey ifade etmiyor. Şu andan itibaren emirleri veren ben olacağım!"

languages.text: « Je n'ai que faire de ses ordres. Désormais, c'est moi qui commande ! »
languages.original_text: "His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai que faire de ses ordres. Désormais, c'est moi qui commande ! »

languages.text: «Sus órdenes no significan nada para mí. ¡A partir de ahora, las órdenes las doy yo!».
languages.original_text: "His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"

traits.locale_text: «Sus órdenes no significan nada para mí. ¡A partir de ahora, las órdenes las doy yo!».

languages.text: "Seine Befehle bedeuten mir nichts. Ab sofort erteile ich hier die Befehle!"
languages.original_text: "His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"

traits.locale_text: "Seine Befehle bedeuten mir nichts. Ab sofort erteile ich hier die Befehle!"

languages.text: 「奴の命令など、私には何の意味もない。この瞬間より、命令を下すのは、この私だ！」
languages.original_text: "His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"

traits.locale_text: 「奴の命令など、私には何の意味もない。この瞬間より、命令を下すのは、この私だ！」
